summary: P0 Bug Fix Verified: Hybrid Training feedback queue now displays correctly. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend E2E test confirmed 9 pending feedback items visible in queue. Root causes fixed: 1) hybrid_training added to ALL_MODULE_IDS, 2) Frontend error handling with retry logic and toast notifications, 3) Sync endpoint with 3-attempt retry.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns {status: ok}
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin (futureroads/@@U1s9m6c7@@) returns token with hybrid_training in allowed_modules
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with standard user (Lew/Lew123) returns token with hybrid_training in allowed_modules
Backend: GET /api/training/sync returns {synced, total} - synced from Readisys API
Backend: GET /api/training/sync requires admin role (403 for non-admin)
Backend: GET /api/training/feedbacks returns array of feedback items with status, sentinel_id, assigned_status, correct_status
Backend: Feedbacks have status=pending for unprocessed items
Backend: GET /api/training/stats returns queue_pending >= 0
Backend: GET /api/training/updates returns array
Backend: GET /api/training/monitors returns array
Backend: POST /api/training/analyze/{feedback_id} creates qwen_update and opencv_update (MOCKED)
Backend: POST /api/training/apply/{update_id} changes status to applied (MOCKED)
Backend: Analyze non-existent feedback returns 404
Backend: Apply non-existent update returns 404
Backend: All training endpoints require authentication
Frontend: Login flow (heart click → EKG animation → form → /hub)
Frontend: Navigation to /hybridtraining works for admin
Frontend: Hybrid Training page displays HYBRID TRAINING title
Frontend: Feedback Queue shows 9 pending items
Frontend: Step navigation (FEEDBACK QUEUE, ANALYZE, UPDATES, APPLY, MONITOR) works
Frontend: SYNC button present and functional
Frontend: Queue count (QUEUE: 9) displayed in header
Frontend: Processed section shows analyzed items
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fixed. Hybrid Training module fully functional. Backend uses MongoDB with JWT auth. Login has 5-second EKG animation. Admin sees hybrid_training in allowed_modules. Sync endpoint fetches from external Readisys API with 3-attempt retry. Qwen analysis and OpenCV rule application are MOCKED (Steps 2-5). Step 1 (feedback queue) uses REAL Readisys API data.
mocked_api_note: POST /api/training/analyze/{feedback_id} (mocked Qwen), POST /api/training/apply/{update_id} (mocked OpenCV). Dashboard stats, subscribers, devices are also mocked. Email sending is mocked (no RESEND_API_KEY).

root_causes_fixed: Frontend syncFromSource() has 3-attempt retry with error toast (lines 368-391 HybridTraining.jsx)
Frontend fetchAll() has proper error handling (lines 393-409 HybridTraining.jsx)
Seed fast-path now updates allowed_modules for existing users (lines 398-406 server.py)
